---
title: Example applications
description: Open source browser apps built with Elata EEG, Web Bluetooth, and rPPG packages.
---

These projects are **full applications** that ship on GitHub Pages. They complement the
[`create-elata-demo`](/reference/create-elata-demo) scaffolder and the
[Build A Browser App](/browser-apps) chooser: use those for the fastest evaluation, then study
these repos when you want routing, game loops, session summaries, or multi-package wiring in a real
product-shaped codebase.

Screenshots below are **WebP** gameplay captures (desktop and mobile). Each repo’s
`docs/store-assets/` holds additional sizes (`full`, `1200w`, `800w`, …) for listings and docs.
Regenerate from PNG masters with `npm run process-screenshots` in the **`app-store-assets`**
folder (sibling to the SDK in the Elata apps workspace).

## Apps

| App | What it shows | Live demo | Source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Breathwork Trainer | Guided breathing protocols with live EEG and rPPG session UI | [Play](https://wkyleg.github.io/breathwork-trainer/) | [wkyleg/breathwork-trainer](https://github.com/wkyleg/breathwork-trainer) |
| NeuroFlight | 3D flight sim with AI opponent and post-session neural analytics | [Play](https://wkyleg.github.io/neuroflight/) | [wkyleg/neuroflight](https://github.com/wkyleg/neuroflight) |
| Monkey Mind: Inner Invaders | Canvas arcade with brain-reactive gameplay and level reports | [Play](https://wkyleg.github.io/monkey-mind/) | [wkyleg/monkey-mind](https://github.com/wkyleg/monkey-mind) |
| Neuro Chess | Chess vs Stockfish with live neuro HUD and post-game charts | [Play](https://wkyleg.github.io/neuro-chess/) | [wkyleg/neuro-chess](https://github.com/wkyleg/neuro-chess) |
| Reaction Trainer | Reaction game with stress-modulated difficulty and results analytics | [Play](https://wkyleg.github.io/reaction-trainer/) | [wkyleg/reaction-trainer](https://github.com/wkyleg/reaction-trainer) |

## Packages used

All five apps consume published npm packages from `@elata-biosciences`:

| Package | Role in these apps |
| --- | --- |
| `@elata-biosciences/eeg-web` | WASM-backed EEG analysis, band powers, derived features |
| `@elata-biosciences/eeg-web-ble` | Web Bluetooth headset streaming (Muse built-in) |
| `@elata-biosciences/rppg-web` | Camera-based pulse and related metrics without a wearable |

Not every app uses every package in the same way; open the repo that matches your use case.

## Store listing copy and art

Each linked repository includes **`docs/store-assets/`** with `listing.json` (marketing copy),
PNG exports sized for store-style listings, and **WebP derivatives** for faster loading in READMEs
and docs (`preview-desktop-01-1200w.webp`, `preview-mobile-01-800w.webp`, `banner-800w.webp`,
`icon-512.webp`, etc.).

## Where to go next

- [Quickstart](/quickstart): scaffold a minimal demo first
- [Build A Browser App](/browser-apps): main chooser for tutorials and paths
- [Package Selection](/package-selection): choose packages for your own app
- [EEG In A Browser App](/guides/eeg-browser) and [rPPG In A Browser App](/guides/rppg-browser): integration detail
